falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4200 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 lows would invalidate the 78% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, proving this is not a similar bottoming structure but rather a continuation of breakdown

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained volatility spike above the August 2024 regime would show this is a different macro environment—likely a genuine crisis rather than a tradable bottom, invalidating the HOLD signal which assumed contained stress

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% and stays there for 5+ days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-safety bid this extreme would indicate recession/credit event rather than soft-landing bottom, proving the blowoff score of 40 understated systemic risk and the pattern match was false correlation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
